title: Week of March 23, 2026
summary: This week delivered major reliability improvements for Salesforce data operations, with enhanced tracking of all automation processes and better error handling. We also expanded platform support with native Windows installation and added comprehensive revenue field detection to help RevOps teams understand their Salesforce org structure more effectively.

entries.headline: Improved Salesforce automation discovery reliability
details: Better tracking of workflows and flows during data extraction
More reliable connection to HubSpot and Marketo platforms

entries.headline: Enhanced Salesforce process extraction accuracy
details: More reliable discovery of automation processes
Better tracking of different types of Salesforce workflows

entries.headline: Completed Salesforce automation inventory improvements
details: More thorough collection of triggers, classes, and flows
Better tracking of all automation components in your org

entries.headline: Enhanced production org safety controls
details: Safer handling of read-only operations in production environments
Better protection against accidental changes to live data

entries.headline: Automated release notes system launched
details: Release notes now generate automatically from development changes
Daily updates published to keep you informed of new features and fixes

entries.headline: Faster simple data lookups in Salesforce
details: Single-record queries now run more efficiently
Improved performance for basic verification checks

entries.headline: Native Windows installation support
details: Automatic installation of required tools on Windows computers
Streamlined setup process using built-in Windows package manager

entries.headline: Better error detection and reporting
details: More accurate identification of connection problems
Clearer error messages when operations fail

entries.headline: Improved Windows setup compatibility
details: Fixed installation issues when running setup commands
Better error handling during initial configuration

entries.headline: Better revenue data tracking in assessments
details: Assessment results now include revenue context for future reference

entries.headline: Customizable templates and branding options
details: Create and manage custom templates that persist across updates
Personalize your OpsPal experience with custom branding elements

entries.headline: Automatic revenue field detection in Salesforce orgs
details: Automatically identifies your org's revenue tracking fields
Recognizes different sales processes and opportunity stages
Adapts assessments to your specific revenue model

entries.headline: Salesforce deployment safety checks
details: Validates picklist and record type configurations before deployment
Prevents field history tracking limit violations
Checks for configuration conflicts that could break deployments

entries.headline: Enhanced security scanning for sensitive data
details: Automatic detection of accidentally committed credentials or secrets

entries.headline: Continuous security monitoring added
details: Ongoing scanning for security vulnerabilities and data exposure risks

entries.headline: Removed embedded credentials from system files
details: Enhanced security by eliminating hardcoded authentication information
